segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, ma'am, I am Dr. Raksha from Tata A.I.A. This is a telephonic medical verification for your policy. Are you available here?

segments.text: Okay. Should I speak in Marathi or some other language?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Okay. To proceed with your policy, a telephonic medical verification is being done. This call is recorded for the company's policy and audit purposes. Any information you provide regarding your health or habits will be considered a part of the insurance application. Based on that, a legal contract will be formed between Tata A.I.A. Life Insurance and you. Any incorrect information can affect your contract. Your policy can be canceled, and your claim can also be rejected. So, whatever information you provide, give it thoughtfully and correctly. Please state your name.

segments.text: Please state your date of birth.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: What do you do for work currently?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You also do a job and are self-employed, also do business.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Do you have your PAN card number or Aadhaar card number, what can you tell me? What do you have currently?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please state your PAN card number.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please tell me correctly, ma'am. What did you say?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: V J D C B 1 2 8 3 R.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Where are you speaking from currently, which city, ma'am?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Now I will ask you some medical verification questions, ma'am. It is necessary for me to ask all these questions. It is necessary to ask about all diseases. If you have any disease, you need to provide that information, otherwise, you can say no. Listen to my full sentence and then answer.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you consumed smoking, tobacco, or any nicotine products in the last 24 months?
